Container.Name: m3u-editor
Container.Overview: m3u-editor is a powerful tool for managing and editing M3U playlists.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: The port used for the web interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent configuration data.

Config.Name: Postgres Data
Config.Description: Persistent Postgres data.

Config.Name: User Uploaded Assets
Config.Description: Persistent user uploaded assets.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Set the container timezone.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: The URL of the application. Used for generating links and authentication redirects. Use 'http://[IP]:36400' for local access or your external domain.

Config.Name: App Port
Config.Description: The internal port the application listens on.

Config.Name: Enable Postgres
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to use the embedded Postgres database, or 'false' to use an external database.

Config.Name: Postgres Database
Config.Description: The name of the embedded Postgres database.

Config.Name: Postgres User
Config.Description: The username for the embedded Postgres database.

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: The password for the embedded Postgres database.

Config.Name: Postgres Port
Config.Description: The port the embedded Postgres server listens on.

Config.Name: Database Connection
Config.Description: Database driver (pgsql, sqlite, etc.).

Config.Name: Database Host
Config.Description: The hostname or IP of the database server.

Config.Name: Database Port
Config.Description: The port of the database server.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: The name of the database.

Config.Name: Database Username
Config.Description: The username for the database.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: The password for the database.

Config.Name: Redis Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the embedded Redis server.

Config.Name: Redis Server Port
Config.Description: The port the internal Redis server listens on.

Config.Name: Redis Host
Config.Description: Hostname of IP of the Redis server. Use 'localhost' for the embedded Redis.

Config.Name: Redis Password
Config.Description: Password for the Redis server. Must match internal settings if using embedded Redis.

Config.Name: M3U Proxy Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the embedded M3U Proxy.

Config.Name: M3U Proxy Port
Config.Description: The port used for the M3U Proxy.

Config.Name: M3U Proxy Host
Config.Description: Internal network hostname or IP of the M3U Proxy. Use 'localhost' for the embedded proxy.

Config.Name: M3U Proxy Token
Config.Description: A secure token for the M3U Proxy. Generate a random string (eg: openssl rand -hex 32).
